testcase.classname: Home component shows empty-state prompt when there are no chats
testcase.name: Home component shows empty-state prompt when there are no chats

testcase.classname: Home component renders chat messages returned from the API
testcase.name: Home component renders chat messages returned from the API

testcase.classname: Home component clears the input after pressing Enter
testcase.name: Home component clears the input after pressing Enter

testcase.classname: Home component sign-out button calls signOut
testcase.name: Home component sign-out button calls signOut

testcase.classname: Authentication Home component is wrapped with authenticator
testcase.name: Authentication Home component is wrapped with authenticator

testcase.classname: Example Test should pass
testcase.name: Example Test should pass

testcase.classname: early-exit conditions REMOVE event returns 200 without calling Bedrock or GraphQL
testcase.name: early-exit conditions REMOVE event returns 200 without calling Bedrock or GraphQL

testcase.classname: early-exit conditions message_in_thread > 6 returns 204 without calling Bedrock
testcase.name: early-exit conditions message_in_thread > 6 returns 204 without calling Bedrock

testcase.classname: early-exit conditions message_in_thread == 6 does NOT return 204 (off-by-one guard)
testcase.name: early-exit conditions message_in_thread == 6 does NOT return 204 (off-by-one guard)

testcase.classname: Amplify.configure is called with env vars on every invocation
testcase.name: Amplify.configure is called with env vars on every invocation

testcase.classname: personality resolution uses custom personalities from GraphQL when found
testcase.name: personality resolution uses custom personalities from GraphQL when found

testcase.classname: personality resolution falls back to default "Jim"/"Mark" when personalities list is empty
testcase.name: personality resolution falls back to default "Jim"/"Mark" when personalities list is empty

testcase.classname: personality resolution falls back to defaults when listPersonalities throws — handler does not throw
testcase.name: personality resolution falls back to defaults when listPersonalities throws — handler does not throw

testcase.classname: speaker selection name_1 (Jim) speaks when last_speaker is not Jim
testcase.name: speaker selection name_1 (Jim) speaks when last_speaker is not Jim

testcase.classname: speaker selection name_2 (Mark) speaks when last_speaker is Jim
testcase.name: speaker selection name_2 (Mark) speaks when last_speaker is Jim

testcase.classname: speaker selection name_1 (Jim) speaks when last_speaker is "You" (the user)
testcase.name: speaker selection name_1 (Jim) speaks when last_speaker is "You" (the user)

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — first message (message_in_thread == 0) builds a single user message from last_statement
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — first message (message_in_thread == 0) builds a single user message from last_statement

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — first message (message_in_thread == 0) newlines in the initial message are replaced with spaces
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — first message (message_in_thread == 0) newlines in the initial message are replaced with spaces

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=1 (odd): only the initial user message is sent
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=1 (odd): only the initial user message is sent

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=2 (even): start=2, loop never runs — msg1 is skipped
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=2 (even): start=2, loop never runs — msg1 is skipped

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=3 (odd): [user(Q0), assistant(A1), user(Q2)]
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=3 (odd): [user(Q0), assistant(A1), user(Q2)]

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=4 (even): start=2, msg1 skipped — [user(Q0), assistant(A2), user(Q3)]
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=4 (even): start=2, msg1 skipped — [user(Q0), assistant(A2), user(Q3)]

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=5 (odd): full alternating sequence of 5 messages
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) length=5 (odd): full alternating sequence of 5 messages

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) sorts chats by message_in_thread before building messages
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) sorts chats by message_in_thread before building messages

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) newlines in chat history messages are replaced with spaces
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) newlines in chat history messages are replaced with spaces

testcase.classname: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) falls back to last_statement single message when listChats throws — handler does not throw
testcase.name: Bedrock message construction — continuation (message_in_thread > 0) falls back to last_statement single message when listChats throws — handler does not throw

testcase.classname: Bedrock response trimming trims to last period
testcase.name: Bedrock response trimming trims to last period

testcase.classname: Bedrock response trimming trims to last exclamation mark
testcase.name: Bedrock response trimming trims to last exclamation mark

testcase.classname: Bedrock response trimming trims to last question mark
testcase.name: Bedrock response trimming trims to last question mark

testcase.classname: Bedrock response trimming uses the furthest punctuation when multiple types present
testcase.name: Bedrock response trimming uses the furthest punctuation when multiple types present

testcase.classname: Bedrock response trimming falls back to "I'm speechless. " when no sentence-ending punctuation
testcase.name: Bedrock response trimming falls back to "I'm speechless. " when no sentence-ending punctuation

testcase.classname: Bedrock response trimming falls back to "I'm speechless. " when Bedrock returns empty string
testcase.name: Bedrock response trimming falls back to "I'm speechless. " when Bedrock returns empty string

testcase.classname: createChat output payload createChat is called with the correct output shape
testcase.name: createChat output payload createChat is called with the correct output shape

testcase.classname: createChat output payload message_in_thread in createChat output is incoming value + 1
testcase.name: createChat output payload message_in_thread in createChat output is incoming value + 1

testcase.classname: return values and error handling returns "Successfully processed DynamoDB record" on success
testcase.name: return values and error handling returns "Successfully processed DynamoDB record" on success

testcase.classname: return values and error handling does not throw when createChat GraphQL fails — returns success string
testcase.name: return values and error handling does not throw when createChat GraphQL fails — returns success string

testcase.classname: Bedrock invocation parameters ConverseCommand is called with the default model ID
testcase.name: Bedrock invocation parameters ConverseCommand is called with the default model ID

testcase.classname: Bedrock invocation parameters ConverseCommand is called with the correct inferenceConfig
testcase.name: Bedrock invocation parameters ConverseCommand is called with the correct inferenceConfig

testcase.classname: Bedrock invocation parameters BedrockRuntimeClient is instantiated with the us-east-1 region
testcase.name: Bedrock invocation parameters BedrockRuntimeClient is instantiated with the us-east-1 region

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler allows email from rohtbart.com
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler allows email from rohtbart.com

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler allows email from aetion.com
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler allows email from aetion.com

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler domain matching is case-insensitive
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler domain matching is case-insensitive

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler allows bobschwartz314@gmail.com
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler allows bobschwartz314@gmail.com

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler allows aglazer@fourcubits.com
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler allows aglazer@fourcubits.com

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler allows jets613@gmail.com
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler allows jets613@gmail.com

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler allows betsymorserohtbart@gmail.com
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler allows betsymorserohtbart@gmail.com

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler address matching is case-insensitive
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler address matching is case-insensitive

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler rejects unknown gmail address
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler rejects unknown gmail address

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler rejects unknown domain
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler rejects unknown domain

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler rejects partial domain match (attackeraetion.com is not aetion.com)
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler rejects partial domain match (attackeraetion.com is not aetion.com)

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler rejects subdomain of acceptable domain (sub.aetion.com is not aetion.com)
testcase.name: botchatpresignup handler rejects subdomain of acceptable domain (sub.aetion.com is not aetion.com)

testcase.classname: botchatpresignup handler rejects address with empty local part
